broadcast.text: Jonathan Taylor at five was surgical. And now the greatest QB class in mock history falls right into his lap at twenty? The lobby is CRYING.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: Fourteen picks flew by like a commercial break and the running back shelf got stripped to the studs. Now D1LLIGAF stares at a wall of quarterbacks at twenty. Value or trap? We're about to find out.
broadcast.speaker: anchor

broadcast.text: A fresh draft and destiny STILL hands the franchise pick five. You can't script this - well, you can, and the script says greatness.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: Take two: same lobby, same slot, and the same four names off the board before D1LLIGAF touches his keyboard. Five is where drafts are won or wasted, folks.
broadcast.speaker: anchor
